verdict: These strips use simple mechanical adhesion technology to extract sebum and debris. Highly effective for visible pore cleansing with minimal chemical exposure.

_research.name: Pore Cleansing Strips Nose Pads
pros: No active ingredients to irritate skin
Clinically proven results with strong review validation
_research.con: Only surface-level pore cleansing; doesn't prevent sebum buildup long-term.
